'''lasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leafily|leafily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leafily|leafily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lasate|lasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lasatesher|lasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasatesherĂ«m|lasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lasatero|lasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lasateshĂ«|lasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasateshĂ«m|lasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilasatero|gokilasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilasateshĂ«|gokilasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasateshĂ«m|gokilasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golasankerom|golasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golasankeshĂ«|golasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golasankeshĂ«m|golasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golasankeya|golasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lasaterom|lasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasatemu|lasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lasateya|lasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilasaterom|gokilasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasatemu|gokilasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilasateya|gokilasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lasasate|lasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lasasatesher|lasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasasatesherĂ«m|lasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lasasatero|lasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lasasateshĂ«|lasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasasateshĂ«m|lasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilasasatero|gokilasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilasasateshĂ«|gokilasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasasateshĂ«m|gokilasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golasasankerom|golasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golasasankeshĂ«|golasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golasasankeshĂ«m|golasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golasasankeya|golasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lasasaterom|lasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasasatemu|lasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lasasateya|lasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilasasaterom|gokilasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasasatemu|gokilasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilasasateya|gokilasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠte|lĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠtesher|lĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠtero|lĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠsĂŠtero|gokilĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠsĂŠnkerom|golĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠsĂŠnkeya|golĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠterom|lĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠtemu|lĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠteya|lĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠsĂŠterom|gokilĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠsĂŠteya|gokilĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafsafte|lafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafsaftesher|lafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafsaftesherĂ«m|lafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafsaftero|lafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafsafteshĂ«|lafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafsafteshĂ«m|lafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafsaftero|gokilafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafsafteshĂ«|gokilafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafsafteshĂ«m|gokilafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafsafnkerom|golafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafsafnkeshĂ«|golafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafsafnkeshĂ«m|golafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafsafnkeya|golafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafsafterom|lafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafsaftemu|lafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafsafteya|lafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafsafterom|gokilafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafsaftemu|gokilafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafsafteya|gokilafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
